calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2005 Continued To Aug-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Michael Lieberman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sarah Chen, also present, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Contract------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: James A. Jefferson and Roscoe Hankins III.
Counsel to prepare and submit Proposed Judgments for signature, and stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.

July 14, 2005
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $200,000.00
Costs per memo of cost.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
